name: Cobble Corn Chili Tacos
recipeIngredient: 1 can (17 oz) whole kernel sweet corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange taco shells in a shallow baking pan and place in the oven on low heat (250 degrees) to crisp while preparing the filling.
2. Heat a large skillet; crumble the meat and cook until browned, stirring constantly.
3. Tilt the skillet and spoon off excess fat.
4. Stir in the chili seasoning mix.
5. Add corn, tomatoes, tomato sauce, onion, and celery.
6. Bring to a boil.
7. Turn off heat and let it cool for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Spoon into taco shells.
9. Top with cheese and serve on crisp lettuce.
Alternatively, the filling may be served like chili con carne if you don't prefer taco shells.
10. Makes 6 servings.
